canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>storm prayer</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { 
      background: #0a0a0f; 
      overflow: hidden; 
      cursor: crosshair;
    }
    canvas { display: block; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <canvas id="storm"></canvas>
  <script>
    const canvas = document.getElementById('storm');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    
    let width, height;
    let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
    let bolts = [];
    let afterglows = [];
    let lastStrike = 0;
    let tension = 0;
    let cloudLayers = [];
    
    function resize() {
      width = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
      height = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
      generateClouds();
    }
    
    function generateClouds() {
      cloudLayers = [];
      for (let layer = 0; layer < 3; layer++) {
        const clouds = [];
        const count = 8 + layer * 4;
        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
          clouds.push({
            x: Math.random() * width,
            y: Math.random() * height * 0.4,
            radius: 80 + Math.random() * 120 - layer * 20,
            speed: 0.1 + Math.random() * 0.2 + layer * 0.05,
            opacity: 0.15 - layer * 0.03
          });
        }
        cloudLayers.push(clouds);
      }
    }
    
    class LightningBolt {
      constructor(x1, y1, x2, y2, depth = 0, maxDepth = 5) {
        this.segments = [];
        this.branches = [];
        this.life = 1;
        this.decay = 0.015 + Math.random() * 0.01;
        this.maxDepth = maxDepth;
        this.generate(x1, y1, x2, y2, depth);
      }
      
      generate(x1, y1, x2, y2, depth) {
        if (depth > this.maxDepth) return;
        
        const dx = x2 - x1;
        const dy = y2 - y1;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        
        if (dist < 10) {
          this.segments.push({ x1, y1, x2, y2, width: Math.max(1, 4 - depth) });
          return;
        }
        
        const midX = (x1 + x2) / 2;
        const midY = (y1 + y2) / 2;
        
        // perpendicular offset
        const perpX = -dy / dist;
        const perpY = dx / dist;
        const offset = (Math.random() - 0.5) * dist * 0.4;
        
        const newMidX = midX + perpX * offset;
        const newMidY = midY + perpY * offset;
        
        this.generate(x1, y1, newMidX, newMidY, depth + 1);
        this.generate(newMidX, newMidY, x2, y2, depth + 1);
        
        // branching
        if (depth < 3 && Math.random() < 0.35 - depth * 0.08) {
          const branchAngle = (Math.random() - 0.5) * Math.PI * 0.6;
          const branchLen = dist * (0.3 + Math.random() * 0.4);
          const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx) + branchAngle;
          const branchEndX = newMidX + Math.cos(angle) * branchLen;
          const branchEndY = newMidY + Math.sin(angle) * branchLen;
          
          this.branches.push(new LightningBolt(
            newMidX, newMidY, 
            branchEndX, branchEndY,
            depth + 2, this.maxDepth
          ));
        }
      }
      
      update() {
        this.life -= this.decay;
        this.branches.forEach(b => b.life = this.life);
        return this.life > 0;
      }
      
      draw(ctx) {
        const alpha = this.life;
        
        // glow layer
        ctx.shadowBlur = 30 * alpha;
        ctx.shadowColor = `rgba(180, 100, 255, ${alpha})`;
        
        this.segments.forEach(seg => {
          // core bolt - cyan/white
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(seg.x1, seg.y1);
          ctx.lineTo(seg.x2, seg.y2);
          ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(200, 255, 255, ${alpha})`;
          ctx.lineWidth = seg.width * alpha;
          ctx.stroke();
          
          // pink edge
          ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 100, 180, ${alpha * 0.6})`;
          ctx.lineWidth = seg.width * alpha * 2;
          ctx.stroke();
        });
        
        ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        
        this.branches.forEach(b => b.draw(ctx));
      }
    }
    
    class Afterglow {
      constructor(bolt) {
        this.segments = bolt.segments.map(s => ({...s}));
        this.branches = bolt.branches.map(b => new Afterglow(b));
        this.life = 0.8;
        this.decay = 0.008;
      }
      
      update() {
        this.life -= this.decay;
        this.branches.forEach(b => b.life = this.life);
        return this.life > 0;
      }
      
      draw(ctx) {
        const alpha = this.life * 0.3;
        this.segments.forEach(seg => {
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(seg.x1, seg.y1);
          ctx.lineTo(seg.x2, seg.y2);
          ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(120, 50, 180, ${alpha})`;
          ctx.lineWidth = seg.width * 3;
          ctx.stroke();
        });
        this.branches.forEach(b => b.draw(ctx));
      }
    }
    
    function strike(x, y) {
      const startX = x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 200;
      const startY = Math.random() * 50;
      const bolt = new LightningBolt(startX, startY, x, y, 0, 6);
      bolts.push(bolt);
      afterglows.push(new Afterglow(bolt));
      
      // flash
      tension = 1;
    }
    
    function drawClouds() {
      cloudLayers.forEach(clouds => {
        clouds.forEach(cloud => {
          cloud.x += cloud.speed;
          if (cloud.x > width + cloud.radius) cloud.x = -cloud.radius;
          
          const flashBoost = tension * 0.3;
          const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
            cloud.x, cloud.y, 0,
            cloud.x, cloud.y, cloud.radius
          );
          gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(60, 30, 90, ${cloud.opacity + flashBoost})`);
          gradient.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(30, 15, 50, ${cloud.opacity * 0.5 + flashBoost * 0.5})`);
          gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0)');
          
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(cloud.x, cloud.y, cloud.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
          ctx.fill();
        });
      });
    }
    
    function drawHorizon() {
      const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, height * 0.7, 0, height);
      gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0)');
      gradient.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(20, 10, 30, 0.5)');
      gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(30, 15, 40, 0.8)');
      ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
      ctx.fillRect(0, height * 0.7, width, height * 0.3);
      
      // distant city silhouette
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(5, 5, 10, ${0.9 + tension * 0.1})`;
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x += 30 + Math.random() * 40) {
        const h = 20 + Math.random() * 60;
        const w = 15 + Math.random() * 25;
        ctx.fillRect(x, height - h, w, h);
        
        // occasional lit window
        if (Math.random() < 0.3) {
          ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 200, 100, ${0.3 + tension * 0.5})`;
          ctx.fillRect(x + w * 0.3, height - h + 10, 3, 4);
          ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(5, 5, 10, ${0.9 + tension * 0.1})`;
        }
      }
    }
    
    function animate(time) {
      // clear with slight fade for trails
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.3)';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
      
      // flash effect
      if (tension > 0) {
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(100, 80, 150, ${tension * 0.15})`;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
        tension *= 0.9;
      }
      
      drawClouds();
      drawHorizon();
      
      // update and draw afterglows
      afterglows = afterglows.filter(a => {
        a.draw(ctx);
        return a.update();
      });
      
      // update and draw bolts
      bolts = bolts.filter(b => {
        b.draw(ctx);
        return b.update();
      });
      
      // auto-strike with some randomness, influenced by mouse position
      const timeSinceStrike = time - lastStrike;
      const strikeChance = timeSinceStrike > 800 ? 0.008 : 0.001;
      
      if (Math.random() < strikeChance) {
        // bias toward mouse position
        const targetX = mouseX * 0.6 + Math.random() * width * 0.4;
        const targetY = height * 0.5 + Math.random() * height * 0.4;
        strike(targetX, targetY);
        lastStrike = time;
      }
      
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }
    
    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      mouseX = e.clientX;
      mouseY = e.clientY;
    });
    
    canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      strike(e.clientX, e.clientY);
      lastStrike = performance.now();
    });
    
    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
    resize();
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  </script>
</body>
</html>
